tool_input.description: Fix wrong username in closeout-guard hook path

global_findings.title: Nearly all implementation work is uncommitted
global_findings.summary: Only 5 files are committed to the branch (the notifications fix). The entire ~3,300-line review-diff.patch represents unstaged working-tree changes covering foundation primitives, shell hierarchy, workspace population, sales/orders, inventory, procurement, relationships, and accounting. Any worktree reset or stash drop would destroy this work.

global_findings.title: Audit tickets claim incomplete sweeps
global_findings.summary: TER-1095 (variant=default badges), TER-1096 (generic empty states), and TER-1097 (ISO timestamps): Implement.md explicitly says 'started replacing' for TER-1095. None of the three audit tickets include a grep-based inventory showing every instance found and verified-fixed. Fixes visible in the diff are representative, not exhaustive.

global_findings.title: Notifications cluster has no browser or runtime evidence
global_findings.summary: TER-1129 through TER-1133 have code and a new Vitest file for InlineNotificationPanel, but runtime-ui-checks.json contains zero entries for these tickets. The group-hover mark-read button (opacity-0 → group-hover:opacity-100) is a CSS interaction that unit tests cannot verify. No screenshot or Playwright check confirms the visual distinction, category split, or contextual empty states render in a real browser.

global_findings.title: New foundation files absent from review-diff.patch
global_findings.summary: statusBadge.ts, statusBadge.test.ts, and operational-states.tsx are new files that exist in the worktree and are correctly wired, but they do not appear in review-diff.patch because that diff only captures modified files. The review artifact has a structural blind spot: the foundation primitives that downstream tickets depend on cannot be independently reviewed from the patch alone.

global_findings.title: Workspace meta and commandStrip items lack dedicated unit tests
global_findings.summary: TER-1101 through TER-1108: meta label content and dynamic values are in source code but have no assertions in the test suite. The runtime-route-audit.json captures visible action button labels (via button/link selectors), not meta item text. Any future refactor that silently drops or scrambles meta labels has no regression guard.

ticket_scores.rationale: statusTokens.ts adds OPERATIONAL_STATUS_TOKENS, buildStatusTokenMap, and five domain token maps (ORDER_FULFILLMENT, ORDER_PAYMENT, PURCHASE_ORDER, RELATIONSHIP_ROLE, RELATIONSHIP_STATUS). statusBadge.ts exists with getStatusBadgeVariant and a companion statusBadge.test.ts referenced in the proof run. Downstream consumers wired in LiveShoppingPage, PhotographyPage, TimeClockPage, ClientsWorkSurface, OrdersWorkSurface, ClientProfilePage.
evidence_refs: Implement.md proof: pnpm vitest run statusBadge.test.ts

ticket_scores.rationale: operational-states.tsx exists with OperationalEmptyState, WorkspacePanelSkeleton, and WorkspaceCommandStripLink. Used in ClientsWorkSurface, ProcurementWorkspacePage, SearchResultsPage. No dedicated unit test file for operational-states.tsx is visible or referenced.
upgrade_actions: Add client/src/components/ui/operational-states.test.tsx with render assertions for OperationalEmptyState (badge presence when searchActive, action button render) and WorkspacePanelSkeleton (aria-live, data-testid).

ticket_scores.rationale: LinearWorkspaceShell.tsx replaces the inline skeleton div with WorkspacePanelSkeleton from operational-states. The new skeleton has role=status, aria-live=polite, and a table-shaped layout. LinearWorkspaceShell.test.tsx covers the skeleton transition. WorkspacePanelSkeleton is itself a richer component than the prior inline markup.

Implement.md explicitly states 'started replacing literal operational variant=default badge usage' — not completed. Diff shows fixes in LiveShoppingPage, PhotographyPage, TimeClockPage, ClientsWorkSurface, and OrdersWorkSurface, but no grep-based audit list is provided and other surfaces (e.g., BillsSurface, SamplesPilotSurface, PurchaseOrderSurface badge cells) are not verified.
upgrade_actions: Run: grep -rn 'variant="default"' client/src --include='*.tsx' | grep -i 'Badge' to enumerate all remaining instances.
Fix or document each remaining instance; add the grep result (showing zero or explicitly scoped exclusions) to the evidence file.

ticket_scores.rationale: Multiple surfaces fixed: DataTable 'No data' → 'Nothing to show yet', EmptyState.NoData preset updated, responsive-table default message changed, OfficeSupplyManager/ShrinkageReport/StockLevelChart copy improved, ClientsWorkSurface and SearchResultsPage use OperationalEmptyState. No grep-based audit list shows all instances found; completeness is asserted but not proven.
upgrade_actions: Run: grep -rn '"No data"\|"No data found"\|"No data available"' client/src --include='*.tsx' to find remaining instances.
Document each surviving instance with a justification or fix it; add the output to the evidence set.

ticket_scores.rationale: SamplesPilotSurface.tsx replaces raw ISO date display with formatOperationalDate() in grid column formatters and inspector fields. InvoicesSurface.tsx adds formatDate() to adjustmentForm.effectiveDate. SamplesPilotSurface.test.tsx verifies 'Mar 1, 2026' and 'Apr 1, 2026'. No codebase-wide ISO timestamp audit was documented.
upgrade_actions: Run: grep -rn '\.toISOString()\|createdAt}\|updatedAt}\|Date\.now()' client/src/components --include='*.tsx' to find rendering sites that emit raw ISO strings.
Fix or document each found instance; add grep output to evidence.

ticket_scores.rationale: AppHeader.tsx adds border-b to the header row, border-r to the breadcrumb zone (with pr-3), and border-l to the user actions zone (with pl-2.5). Height increased to 56px. Runtime-route-audit confirms no horizontal overflow across all routes at 1366px.
evidence_refs: runtime-route-audit.json: all routes show horizontalOverflow: false

ticket_scores.rationale: LinearWorkspaceShell.tsx restructures the header: h1 is the dominant title, eyebrow 'Workspace' is subordinate, section shows as a pill. LinearWorkspaceShell.test.tsx adds test verifying heading level 1 is 'Accounting' and 'Workspace' text is separate. runtime-ui-checks.json TER-1135 confirms dominant=true, fontWeight 650 for workspace titles across 5 routes.

SalesWorkspacePage.tsx changes description from empty string to SALES_WORKSPACE.description. runtime-ui-checks.json TER-1135 confirms description text 'Manage orders, quotes, returns, sales catalogues, and live shopping in a unified sales workspace.' rendered at /sales.

SalesWorkspacePage.tsx adds two meta items ('Action lane' and 'Primary queue') with dynamic values based on activeTab. Code is correct and dynamic. No unit test asserts the meta label text is rendered; runtime-ui-checks.json does not capture workspace meta items.
upgrade_actions: Add a ConsolidatedWorkspaces.test.tsx assertion that renders SalesWorkspacePage with activeTab='orders' and verifies 'Action lane' and 'Primary queue' labels are in the document.

ticket_scores.rationale: InventoryWorkspacePage.tsx adds three meta items ('Active lane', 'Mode', 'Receiving split') with dynamic values per activeTab and surface mode. Code is wired to intakeSurfaceMode and fulfillmentSurfaceMode. No unit test covers meta content.
upgrade_actions: Add a ConsolidatedWorkspaces test that renders InventoryWorkspacePage with activeTab='intake' and confirms 'Active lane' label and 'Direct intake' value render.

ticket_scores.rationale: ProcurementWorkspacePage.tsx adds three meta items with 'Next move' value dynamically switching between 'Continue in Operations' (redirect context) and 'Receive, inspect, and stock' (normal context). ConsolidatedWorkspaces.test.tsx covers the redirect handoff state but not meta label content.
upgrade_actions: Extend ConsolidatedWorkspaces test to assert 'Primary queue' and 'Receiving path' meta labels render in non-redirect state.

ticket_scores.rationale: ProcurementWorkspacePage.tsx adds commandStrip with Purchase Orders, Product Intake, and Inventory WorkspaceCommandStripLinks. runtime-route-audit at /purchase-orders shows 'Product Intake' and 'New Purchase Order' as visible actions, implying the commandStrip is rendered. No explicit label-level assertion.
upgrade_actions: Add a runtime-ui-checks entry or ConsolidatedWorkspaces test asserting 'Purchase Orders', 'Product Intake', and 'Inventory' commandStrip link buttons render at /purchase-orders.

ticket_scores.rationale: RelationshipsWorkspacePage.tsx adds commandStrip with Clients, Suppliers, and Notifications WorkspaceCommandStripLinks. runtime-route-audit at /relationships shows only 3 visibleActions ('Relationships', 'Relationships', 'Quick Add') — none of the commandStrip link labels appear, indicating the selector may not capture them or they weren't rendered in that audit pass.
upgrade_actions: Add a runtime-ui-checks entry for /relationships that specifically asserts 'Clients', 'Suppliers', and 'Notifications' buttons are visible.
Alternatively add a ConsolidatedWorkspaces test verifying the commandStrip renders with the three labels.

ticket_scores.rationale: AccountingWorkspacePage.tsx replaces 'Record a payment'/'Billing cycle' meta with 'Financial period'/'Active lane'/'Flow' meta items. 'Active lane' value is dynamic per activeTab (8 possible states). No unit test or runtime-ui-checks entry confirms accounting meta is rendered.
upgrade_actions: Add a ConsolidatedWorkspaces test asserting 'Financial period' and 'Active lane' label text renders in AccountingWorkspacePage.

ticket_scores.rationale: AccountingWorkspacePage.tsx adds commandStrip with Dashboard/Invoices/Payments/Periods WorkspaceCommandStripLinks and active-state highlighting. runtime-route-audit at /accounting/invoices shows 'Invoices' twice and 'Create Invoice' but not 'Dashboard', 'Payments', or 'Periods' commandStrip links.
upgrade_actions: Add runtime-ui-checks evidence confirming 'Dashboard', 'Invoices', 'Payments', 'Periods' commandStrip links visible at /accounting.

ticket_scores.rationale: ClientsWorkSurface.tsx adds tableScrollRef, saves scroll position to sessionStorage (CLIENTS_SCROLL_STATE_KEY) before navigating to a profile, and restores it via requestAnimationFrame on mount. Filter persistence is pre-existing via localStorage. No unit test for scroll save-restore behavior.
upgrade_actions: Add a unit test that: (1) renders ClientsWorkSurface with a scrolled tableScrollRef, (2) triggers navigateToProfile(), (3) asserts sessionStorage has the scroll key set, (4) re-renders and asserts scrollTop is restored.

ticket_scores.rationale: OrdersWorkSurface.tsx imports ORDER_FULFILLMENT_STATUS_TOKENS and ORDER_PAYMENT_STATUS_TOKENS from statusTokens. OrderStatusBadge uses the fulfillment token map. New OrderPaymentBadge uses the payment token map with overdue detection. OrdersWorkSurface.visibility.test.tsx verifies 'Overdue' badge visible for overdue confirmed order.

OrdersWorkSurface.tsx adds isPaymentOverdue() and applies 'border-l-2 border-l-destructive STATUS_DANGER_SUBTLE' for overdue rows and 'border-l-2 border-l-amber-500 STATUS_WARNING_SUBTLE' for PARTIAL rows. Test verifies 'Overdue' badge text is present. No test asserts the className applied to the row element itself.
upgrade_actions: Add a test assertion that the order row element has 'border-l-2' and the destructive class when the order is overdue.

ticket_scores.rationale: OrdersWorkSurface.tsx introduces QuickAction type with priority field, builds a sorted quickActions array, takes top-2 as primaryQuickActions, puts remainder in a DropdownMenu. runtime-ui-checks.json TER-1139 confirms 'Confirm for Fulfillment' dialog is visible after clicking the primary action.

Due Date column added to orders table header and row cells. Visibility test asserts 'Due Date' header and 'Feb 15, 2026' formatted date render. runtime-ui-checks.json TER-1134 confirms headerLabels include 'Due Date'. runtime-ui-checks.json TER-1136 confirms ordersDueDate column is visible and within viewport at 1280px.

getActionableOrderPriority() assigns 0=overdue, 1=READY_FOR_PACKING, 2=PACKED, 3=PARTIAL, 4=PENDING, 5=SHIPPED, 6=draft, 7=other. Default sortKey changed from 'newest' to 'actionable'. Sort case in the switch is implemented. No dedicated unit test for the priority ladder.
upgrade_actions: Add a pure unit test for getActionableOrderPriority covering all priority tiers: overdue (priority 0), READY_FOR_PACKING (1), draft (6), and one default case (7).
Add a test that renders OrdersWorkSurface with mixed orders and asserts the overdue order appears first in the rendered list.

ticket_scores.rationale: InventoryManagementSurface.tsx computes lowStockCount from INVENTORY_EXCEPTION_STOCK_STATUSES (LOW/CRITICAL/OUT_OF_STOCK) and quarantinedCount from rows. Exception indicator buttons 'Low stock (N)' and 'Quarantine (N)' render when counts > 0 and act as filter toggles. InventoryManagementSurface.test.tsx verifies 'Low stock (1)' button is in the document.

InventoryManagementSurface.tsx replaces dashStats-derived counts (global) with visibleBatchCount, visibleUnits, visibleInventoryValue computed from the filtered rows array. Status bar now shows 'N visible batches', 'N visible units', 'N visible value'. No dedicated test distinguishes visible vs. global counts.
upgrade_actions: Add a unit test that sets rows to a subset of mock data and asserts the status bar shows the subset count (not the global dashStats total).

ticket_scores.rationale: ConsolidatedWorkspaces.test.tsx adds tests: (1) classic intake mode renders Direct Intake Surface only, (2) sheet-native intake mode renders Intake Pilot Surface only, not Direct Intake. Documentation.md confirms tab separation is the accepted solution.

ConsolidatedWorkspaces.test.tsx adds test: sheet-native shipping mode renders Fulfillment Pilot Surface and asserts Pick Pack Surface is NOT present. Combined with TER-1116 tests, mutual exclusion for all three mode/tab combinations is verified.

PurchaseOrderSurface.tsx removes showExpectedDeliveryColumn conditional; expectedDeliveryDate column is now always in queueColumnDefs. Test renamed to 'always shows the expected delivery column, even when every visible row is unset' and verifies .toContain('expectedDeliveryDate'). runtime-ui-checks.json TER-1136 confirms procurementEta visible: true at x:1106 within 1280px viewport.

PurchaseOrderSurface.tsx adds receivingStatus/receivingStatusLabel/receivingStatusClassName to POQueueRow, getReceivingStatusMeta() function, and receivingStatusLabel column with HTML badge renderer. Test 'adds receiving and ETA columns to the queue table' asserts receivingStatusLabel in columnDefs. runtime-ui-checks.json TER-1136 confirms procurementReceiving visible: true at x:816.

PurchaseOrderSurface.tsx adds isQueueRowOverdue() using isPastExpectedDate(), passes getRowClass to PowersheetGrid applying 'bg-red-50/60 border-l-2 border-red-300' for overdue rows. Test 'marks overdue purchase-order rows with a warning class' verifies getRowClass returns the expected className for an overdue row.

ProcurementWorkspacePage.tsx replaces silent <Redirect> with OperationalEmptyState showing 'This workflow moved to Operations' and an 'Open Operations' button. ConsolidatedWorkspaces.test.tsx verifies the heading, message text, and button render for the receiving tab redirect state.

ClientProfilePage.tsx changes role badges from variant='secondary' to variant='outline' with RELATIONSHIP_ROLE_TOKENS color class. ClientsWorkSurface.tsx ClientTypeBadges also uses RELATIONSHIP_ROLE_TOKENS. No dedicated test asserts the specific className or variant on the ClientProfilePage role badges.
upgrade_actions: Add a test for ClientProfilePage that renders with a mock client having roles=['Customer','Supplier'] and asserts the badge className includes RELATIONSHIP_ROLE_TOKENS.Customer.

ticket_scores.rationale: ClientsWorkSurface.tsx adds 'Last Activity' TableHead and a TableCell with formatDate(getLastActivityDate(client)). runtime-ui-checks.json TER-1134 confirms 'Last Activity' in headerLabels at /relationships. TER-1136 confirms relationshipsLastActivity visible and within viewport at 1280px.

ClientsWorkSurface.tsx adds 'Status' TableHead, getRelationshipStatus() function, and a Badge cell with RELATIONSHIP_STATUS_TOKENS. runtime-ui-checks.json TER-1134 confirms 'Status' in headerLabels. TER-1136 confirms relationshipsStatus visible and within viewport.

ClientsWorkSurface.tsx implements scroll restoration: tableScrollRef attached to the scrollable div, scroll position saved to sessionStorage on navigateToProfile(), restored via requestAnimationFrame on mount. Filter preservation is pre-existing. No unit test exercises the save-restore cycle.
upgrade_actions: Add a unit test: mock sessionStorage, set a known scroll value, render ClientsWorkSurface, and assert requestAnimationFrame callback sets tableScrollRef.current.scrollTop to the stored value.
Add a second assertion: call navigateToProfile() and confirm sessionStorage.setItem was called with CLIENTS_SCROLL_STATE_KEY.

ticket_scores.rationale: AccountingWorkspacePage.tsx first meta item is now 'Financial period' with dynamic value based on activeTab (fiscal-periods vs others). Replaces the original 'Record a payment' static meta. No unit test or runtime-ui-checks entry covers accounting workspace meta content.
upgrade_actions: Add a ConsolidatedWorkspaces test rendering AccountingWorkspacePage and asserting 'Financial period' label text appears in the document.

ticket_scores.rationale: AccountingWorkspacePage.tsx replaces all 9 PilotSurfaceBoundary plain-text fallbacks with WorkspacePanelSkeleton (invoices, bills, payments, general-ledger, chart-of-accounts, expenses, bank-accounts, bank-transactions, fiscal-periods). WorkspacePanelSkeleton has proper ARIA attributes. Comprehensive and consistent change.

AccountingDashboard.tsx reads URL params to detect active filters and renders 'dashboard totals stay global for orientation' disclosure. Documentation.md documents this as an intentional product decision. The original ticket asked for dashboard cards to reflect active filters; the solution is a disclosure note instead. No unit test asserts the disclosure message renders when filter params are present.
upgrade_actions: Add a unit test for AccountingDashboard that renders with a search string containing 'status=OVERDUE' and asserts the 'dashboard totals stay global' or 'Detail views may be filtered' text is in the document.

ticket_scores.rationale: InlineNotificationPanel.tsx has getNotificationCategory() mapping error/warning→'action' and others→'fyi'. UI includes category Select (all/fyi/action) and currentCategory state. InlineNotificationPanel.test.tsx was added (committed). No browser/runtime evidence in runtime-ui-checks.json. Category logic is simplistic (only error/warning are 'action').
upgrade_actions: Add a runtime-ui-checks entry for /notifications: navigate, switch to 'action' category tab, confirm FYI notifications disappear; confirm empty state renders when no action items exist.
Add unit test asserting that selecting 'fyi' category hides error-type notifications.

ticket_scores.rationale: InlineNotificationPanel.tsx applies 'border-l-2 border-l-primary bg-primary/10 pl-[10px]' and 'font-semibold' to unread notification rows, plus a filled circle indicator. No browser/runtime evidence confirms the visual distinction renders correctly.
upgrade_actions: Add a unit test using @testing-library/user-event: render with an unread notification and assert the row element has 'border-l-primary' className and the title has 'font-semibold'.

ticket_scores.rationale: InlineNotificationPanel.tsx applies 'bg-destructive/5' for error-type and 'bg-amber-500/5' for warning-type notifications. The tinting is subtle (5% opacity). No dedicated test or browser evidence verifies the class application per notification type.
upgrade_actions: Add a unit test: render an error-type notification, assert the notification row element has 'bg-destructive/5' className.
Add a second test for warning type asserting 'bg-amber-500/5' className.

ticket_scores.rationale: InlineNotificationPanel.tsx renders a 'Mark read' Button for unread notifications with 'group-hover:opacity-100' (invisible by default). handleMarkReadOnly calls markRead.mutate() on click. The button exists in the DOM but its visibility depends on CSS group-hover which unit tests cannot verify.
upgrade_actions: Add a unit test using @testing-library/user-event: render with an unread notification, confirm 'Mark read' button is in the document, click it, and assert markRead.mutate was called with the correct notificationId.

ticket_scores.rationale: InlineNotificationPanel.tsx has getEmptyStateCopy() returning 6 contextually distinct messages based on filterType and category combination. Messages are semantically appropriate ('No active alerts', 'you are caught up', etc.). No test exercises each empty state combination.
upgrade_actions: Add a unit test parameterized over the 6 filter+category combinations: render with empty notifications list and assert the correct empty state copy renders for each combination.

ticket_scores.rationale: runtime-ui-checks.json confirms duplicatedCells: [] for /sales (7 columns) and /relationships (8 columns). Header labels contain no duplicates. Scope is limited to 2 routes; other surfaces (inventory, procurement, accounting) were not audited for duplication.

runtime-ui-checks.json confirms dominant: true on all 5 workspace routes (/sales, /inventory, /relationships, /accounting, /purchase-orders). Title fontWeight is 650 on all routes (16px on /sales with compact density, 20px on others). LinearWorkspaceShell test also confirms h1 heading level.

runtime-ui-checks.json (port 3001, seeded queue): no horizontal overflow; procurementReceiving visible at x:816, procurementEta at x:1106 (both within 1280px); ordersDueDate visible; relationshipsStatus and relationshipsLastActivity visible. runtime-route-audit.json (port 3000): 0 failures, no overflow on any route.

runtime-ui-checks.json confirms: relationshipOrderLink navigated to '/sales?tab=orders&clientId=13' (reachesSalesWithClientFilter: true); ordersInspectorLink 'Open Client Profile' button visible; invoiceInspectorLink 'Open Client Profile' button visible. All three cross-module link types verified at runtime.

runtime-ui-checks.json confirms: relationships→orders at clickDepth 1, sales→clientProfile at clickDepth 2, invoice→clientProfile at clickDepth 2. All tested paths reachable within 3 clicks. Code also confirms navigateToClientOrders() and buildRelationshipProfilePath() are correctly wired.

runtime-ui-checks.json confirms: ordersConfirmation dialog 'Confirm for Fulfillment' is visible after clicking that action; invoiceVoidConfirmation dialog is visible after clicking void. Two distinct confirmation flows verified at runtime.
